payload.summary: Implement US-060 human-readable Codex chat logs in the Symphony Web UI while preserving raw event artifacts.

payload.evidence: Readable log formatter combines agent deltas, summarizes lifecycle/progress events, preserves raw APP_SERVER_EVENTS.jsonl artifact access, and is covered by Web UI build, Playwright e2e, Rust web tests, desktop smoke, and git diff check.

payload.actions_taken: ["read run contract and Harness docs","implemented React Codex run log formatter","updated task detail review log panel","added Playwright review log fixture","updated story proof","ran build e2e web desktop validation"]
payload.errors: ["npm build initially failed because tsc was not installed before npm ci"]
payload.harness_friction: Worktree lacked npm dependencies, so npm ci was required before Web UI validation; no harness backlog needed.
payload.task_summary: Completed US-060 human-readable Symphony chat logs
